description: AN ENERGY DRINK FOR YOUR FEET Have you ever felt a special energy thrusting you forward, encouraging you to run  longer and more smoother that you can practically say you feel like your flying? Well, if you haven't, then here's your chance to experience the bliss of a healthy run. An absolute energy booster, the reebok Zig Sonic is here to propel you forward and encourage you to run harder and longer with its unique zig-zag inspired outsole,  reducing wear and tear of your shins by up to 20%. Rebook's most technically advanced shoe, the Zig Sonic is configured to minimize strain on the leg muscles allowing you some great running experience. The shoe that helped the brand reemerge as a giant player of the sneaker industry in  2010, the reebok Zig Sonic running trainer has become a household name with its  ornate design. Reebok took that extra leap in outfitting the jersey Shore cast with  its new zig kicks, and soon enough emerged the multi-layered upper Zig Sonic. In fact, when Reebok came up with the idea of the Zig technology, no one even knew it would become as popular as it is now. But today, no one can ever think of a better running shoe design than that of the Reebok Zig Sonic. Multi-layered comfort The Reebok Zig Sonic trainer has multiple layers of a heavy ventilated upper.  Constructed with mesh and leather to offer ample breathability to the feet and at  the same time provide ample support and structure to the shoe, the upper of the Zig  Sonic is coupled with another ventilated layer in triangular cut-outs, similar to  the tessellations featured in the Reebok Zig Slash basket ball shoe, to heighten  breathability and enhance comfort. Spring and sprint far and wide The winning design of the Zig Sonic finds the shoe fitted with an inch of zig- zagging slab of engineered foam in the outsole, making it a lightweight shoe. This  zig-zag styled sole absorbs impact during heelstrike and spreads the shock along the  long winding lines, helping you propel further with much force, ease and comfort. In  short, it's a great spring to wear when you wish to run long and healthy. Upper Mesh uppers with synthetic overlays and synthetic lining with cutouts for style, support and breath ability Grey lace-ups for snug Fit Cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Perforated panel on the tongue for greater breath ability StableFit technology in the heel provides excellent rear-foot fit and stability Play Dry lining on the insole for moisture management Midsole Full-length Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning Outsole ZigTech's unique zigzag sole designed to optimize energy return, helps to propel you forward with each step and reduces wear and tear on your shins by 20% Performance design for lateral support and stability Forefoot flex grooves for flexibility and better running performance Multi-surface outsole for optimal traction TPU medial post for mid foot pronation control Carbon-rubber heel strike offers durability and traction on any surface Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
